Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Video.summary: Watch as Pickleball Pros Dan Granot and Phillip Phillips, paired with NFL legend Brandon Siler and Pickleball professional Ryan Sherry, battle it out in this thrilling Men's Doubles match from the Picklebowl 2022. Filmed in the stunning Sea Island, Georgia, this unique event brings together celebrities and professional athletes representing their alma maters. The game is not only about competition but also raising funds for a great cause, benefiting Desire Street Ministries. With star power from both the sports and entertainment worlds, this exciting match is filled with hard-hitting shots, strategic play, and thrilling moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry
Picklebowl 2022 – Men’s Doubles – Granot & Siler vs Phillips & Sherry

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach, this Round of 16 matchup from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 features Penn State battling Liberty University for a spot in the quarterfinals. With a bid to the National Championship on the line, the stakes are incredibly high in this win-or-go-home match.The contest goes the distance, pushing both teams to their limits. After splitting the initial six games 3-3, the match culminates in a dramatic Sudden Death Dreambreaker (Game 7). Watch standout performances from Liberty's John McCutcheon and Anneliese Brielle, who fight to keep their team alive, and Penn State's Caitlin Hartman and Theodore De Sousa, who deliver clutch plays under pressure.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Penn State vs. Liberty

Video.summary: Witness an intense showdown in Day 3, Tie 2 of the World Pickleball League Season 2 as the Chennai Super Champs face off against the home favorites, Mumbai Pickle Power, at the Jio World Garden. This episode features a mix of elite athleticism and star-studded entertainment, starting with a special appearance by legendary Bollywood choreographer Bosco Martis, who discusses the rhythmic similarities between dance and pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Chennai vs. Mumbai - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.title: Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Picklebowl 2022 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: December 5, 2023 - Welcome to the first round of the semi-finals for season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Peoria Pythons face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: December 5, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: December 5, 2023 - AZ PBL
December 5, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Anna Leigh Waters and J.W. Johnson take on Megan Fudge and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Doubles - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: Live from The Picklr in Noblesville, this NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 matchup features a critical battle between the University of Wisconsin-Madison and Purdue University. With eight national bids and $5,000 in prize money on the line, the stakes are high as the 16th-seeded Purdue takes on the 17th-seeded Wisconsin in a best-of-seven format.The match kicks off with Gender Doubles, where Wisconsin’s duo of Noah and Sarah Sowinski showcase dominant net play and quick hands against Purdue’s Caleb Yang and Trevor Ju. Watch for standout moments, including an incredible Ernie from Wisconsin and strategic adjustments in the Mixed Doubles games involving Colton Thielman and Elena Schlichte.
Video.title: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Image.alt: NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue
NCPA Indiana Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Wisconsin vs. Purdue

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Get ready for a thrilling Pro Mixed Doubles match featuring the number one ranked team of Megan Fudge and Jack Munro taking on Simone Jardim and her brother, Marcelo Jardim. This is the first time these two teams are facing off on the Championship Court. Don't miss the action!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles Fudge/Munro vs. Jardim/Jardim

Video.summary: Rick Witsken and John Sperling take on Jose Derisi and Scott Crandall in this Men's Senior Pro Doubles Backdraw Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Backdraw Semifinal

Video.summary: At the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships in Naples, Florida, Tina Pisnik and Tammy Emmrich square off against Alix Truong and Milan Rane in the Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal match. Expect aggressive shot-making, quick court coverage, and intense chemistry on both sides as these athletes leave it all on the court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Doubles Bronze Medal – Truong & Rane vs Pisnik & Emmrich

Video.summary: Watch a masterclass in senior pro pickleball as Peter Prodanov and Scott Moore take on Scott Crandall and Jose Derisi. With explosive hands, strategic play, and experience driving every point, this US Open quarterfinal is a showcase of skill, grit, and high-level doubles tactics.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi
US Open 2023 – Men’s Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal – Prodanov & Moore vs Crandall & Derisi

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Video.summary: The Naples JBB United face off against the Boca Raton Picklers in a women's match.
Video.title: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Image.alt: NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)
NPL - JBB United vs Picklers (Mens)

Video.summary: In the exciting championship match of Picklebowl 2023, pro pickleball player Kyle Yates teams up with Picklebowl host and former NFL quarterback Danny Wuerffel to challenge the fierce duo of Anna Bright, a top female pro and former collegiate tennis star, and Ameen Hafez. This charity event brings together athletes and celebrities representing their alma maters in a competitive battle for the Picklebowl trophy. Commentary by Dave Fleming and special guest Marcellus Wiley highlights the skill, strategy, and drama on court. Watch intense rallies, strategic plays, and hear insider insights as these top players compete for the title. Don’t miss the dynamic energy and social spirit of pickleball in this must-see final.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez
Picklebowl 2023 – Mixed Doubles Final – Yates & Wuerffel vs Bright & Hafez

Video.summary: Pickleball star JW Johnson & pro football player Marcellus Wiley team up against pro-pickler Jorja Johnson & film director and producer John Brenkus.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2
Picklebowl 2023 - Mixed Doubles 2

Video.summary: October 30, 2023 - Welcome to week 6 - season 2 of The Arizona Pickleball League! It's Tuesday Night Pickleball @ The Orchard, and the Gilbert Gladiators face-off against the Tempe Tornadoes.
Video.title: October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL

Image.alt: October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL
October 30, 2023 - AZ PBL

Video.summary: Experience the exciting Women's Doubles Open 4.5+ Final from the 2023 English Open held at Bolton Arena, Greater Manchester. This match features dynamic teams: Megan Fudge and Susannah Barr face off against Lee Whitwell and Riley Bohnert in a highly competitive final. Follow expert commentary highlighting key plays including Susannah Barr’s precise lobs, Megan Fudge’s powerful forehand, and strategic teamwork. See how the match unfolds in a best-of-three games format with a hard stop on time. This showcase of top-level English pickleball captures the skill, tactics, and intensity of the sport. Stay tuned for post-match insights and upcoming mixed doubles action.
Video.title: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert

Image.alt: English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
English Open 2023 – Women’s Doubles 4.5+ Final – Fudge & Barr vs Whitwell & Bohnert
